concepts.name: Function Composition
concepts.short_definition: Combining two or more functions where the output of one function becomes the input of another.

concepts.name: Derivative Definition
concepts.short_definition: The instantaneous rate of change of a function, defined as a limit of the difference quotient.

concepts.name: Power Rule
concepts.short_definition: A rule for finding the derivative of a power function x^n.

concepts.name: Constant Multiple Rule
concepts.short_definition: The derivative of a constant times a function is the constant times the derivative of the function.

concepts.name: Sum and Difference Rules
concepts.short_definition: The derivative of a sum or difference of functions is the sum or difference of their derivatives.

concepts.name: Chain Rule
concepts.short_definition: A rule for finding the derivative of a composite function.

concepts.name: Outer and Inner Functions
concepts.short_definition: Identifying the separate functions within a composite function for applying the chain rule.

concepts.name: Derivative of Trigonometric Functions
concepts.short_definition: The specific rules for finding the derivatives of sine, cosine, tangent, etc.

concepts.name: Derivative of Exponential Functions
concepts.short_definition: The specific rules for finding the derivatives of functions like e^x or a^x.

concepts.name: Derivative of Logarithmic Functions
concepts.short_definition: The specific rules for finding the derivatives of functions like ln(x) or log_b(x).
